Initial Message:
Katie shivered out in the cold her arms covered in fresh cuts, some down to the beans. Her eyes wide and her pupils dilated. She half two blades in one hand a third blade in her other hand prepared to put it in her mouth. She had a fourth blade in her mouth, cutting into her lips, the corners of her lips, and her tongue.
